turns.user_message: My chest has felt tight all morning for no real reason. It's just this constant low hum of unease.
That tight feeling keeps coming back even when I try to relax. I can't shake the sense that something is just off.
My body feels like it's constantly braced for something bad and I'm worn out. I'm starting to think I should talk to someone about this.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens by describing a physical feeling.
